overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Viking-themed action game showing a warrior walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dusk. The character travels along a narrow path beside a frozen fjord, passing rock formations and eventually entering a narrow canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ledge above frozen fjord

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along narrow snowy path with large round shield on back, cliff wall to the right

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the right boundary of the path
frozen body of water visible in the distance below the path
massive snow-capped mountains rising in the background
distinctive pointed rock formation covered in snow ahead on the path
narrow snow-covered path with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy mountain ledge with a steep cliff wall on the right and a frozen fjord visible far below on the left. The path winds toward a large rock pinnacle ahead, with massive snow-covered mountains dominating the distant horizon under a purple dusk sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along snowy path passing large rock formations and approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: jagged rocky formation emerging from the snow on the right side
large boulder partially buried in snow near the water

segments.scene_description: The path widens as the character passes the rock pinnacle and approaches the frozen fjord shoreline. The cliff wall recedes into the distance while large boulders and rocky outcrops line the path. The frozen water becomes more prominent on the left as the character descends slightly toward the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: open fjord shoreline with distant settlement

events.description: character stops walking and pans camera to observe the frozen fjord and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the frozen fjord and distant fortification before continuing along the shore

entered.detail: stone structure with smoke rising from it visible across the frozen water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open shoreline with the frozen fjord directly beside the path. A distant fortification with smoke is visible across the water. The character stops briefly to survey the landscape, taking in the vast snow-covered mountains before continuing along the icy shore.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking uphill away from the fjord
character enters narrow rocky canyon passage between tall stone walls

agents.ego_description: turning away from the fjord and walking uphill into a narrow mountain canyon passage

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the left side of a narrow mountain passage
tall rock wall forming the right side of a narrow mountain passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the water and walks uphill, leaving the fjord behind. Entering a narrow canyon passage with towering rock walls on both sides, the lighting becomes dimmer as the sky is obscured by the canyon walls. The path continues through the snow-covered mountain terrain toward distant peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain ledge that descends toward a frozen fjord before climbing into a secluded canyon. It begins with the character navigating a narrow path between a steep cliff wall and a deep drop toward the water below, winding toward a large rock pinnacle under a purple dusk sky. As the character passes the pinnacle, the path widens and descends, allowing the frozen shoreline and rocky outcrops to become more prominent. The scene then opens onto the vast expanse of the icy shore, where the character pauses to survey distant fortifications and smoke across the water. Finally, the camera turns away from the fjord and moves uphill, entering a narrow canyon where towering rock walls obscure the sky and dim the lighting as the path leads deeper into the mountain terrain.
